case_title: STARLA ESTRADA VS. KARMA MAGAZINE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, STARLA AS TO DEFENDANT KARMA MAGAZINE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, STARLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARMA MAGAZINE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $5,982.60 PRINCIPAL, $34.04 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,169.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
